name: Fast Loans - Los Angeles Title Loans
description_short: Fast Loans offers same-day auto title loans in Los Angeles, lending up to the wholesale value of vehicles with minimal credit requirements and flexible repayment terms.
description_long:
Fast Loans is a California-based title lending company operating in Los Angeles under California Financing Law License 603I852. The company specializes in providing quick cash advances secured by vehicle titles, positioning itself as a solution for borrowers who need emergency funds without traditional credit checks.

The company offers title loans on cars, trucks, refrigerated trailers (reefers), and standard trailers, provided the vehicle has at least $5,000 in wholesale value and the borrower holds the title. Loans can be approved and funded in as little as one hour according to their marketing materials. Borrowers retain vehicle possession while Fast Loans holds the title as collateral. The application process includes online, email, and in-person options with preapproval available within minutes of providing basic vehicle information.

Fast Loans distinguishes itself through flexibility: no prepayment penalties, customizable monthly payment schedules, and no requirement to pay off loans within the first 60 days of origination. Their Preferred Title Loan program offers $5,000 loans with repayment periods ranging from 14 to 36 months. Minimal documentation requirements (original title, identification, proof of insurance) and credit history independence are marketed as key advantages. The company accepts multiple payment methods including cash and checks.

However, the disclosed APR of 35.9% on their example $5,000/36-month loan is substantially higher than traditional personal loans and approaches predatory lending territory. The $3,234.27 finance charge on a $5,000 loan represents significant cost. While positioned as emergency cash, title loans carry inherent risk: default results in vehicle repossession. The company's testimonials appear repetitive and lack verifiable third-party validation.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available (as little as one hour per website claims)
No prepayment penalties allow early payoff without additional fees
No mandatory minimum payment period after first 60 days
Credit history not required for approval; serves borrowers with bad or no credit
Minimal documentation requirements (title, ID, insurance proof)
Flexible repayment terms (14-36 month options for Preferred program)
Multiple application channels (online, email, in-person) and payment methods
cons: APR of 35.9% on disclosed example loan is extremely high compared to traditional lending
Finance charges substantial ($3,234.27 on $5,000 borrowed over 36 months = 65% of principal)
Default risk results in vehicle repossession, affecting borrower's transportation
Limited transparency on rates for different loan amounts and terms; example-based only
Testimonials appear repetitive and lack third-party verification
best_for: Vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Borrowers with poor credit history needing immediate cash with collateral they can afford to lose
Commercial truck/trailer owners seeking rapid access to capital
diagnosis: Fast Loans is appropriate for vehicle owners facing urgent cash needs who cannot access traditional credit and are willing to use their vehicle as collateral. The critical caveat is the 35.9% APR and high finance charges—borrowers must carefully evaluate whether the emergency justifies the substantial cost, and should exhaust all alternatives (personal loans, credit cards, family assistance, non-profit credit counseling) before proceeding, as default results in vehicle loss.
services: Auto title loans on cars and trucks
Commercial vehicle title loans (big rigs, refrigerated trailers, standard trailers)
Same-day or rapid loan approval and funding
In-person application at Los Angeles location
Flexible monthly payment plans (14-36 month terms available)
Multiple payment methods (cash, checks, and other options)
